title: leucas nutans
intro: Leucas nutans, also known as the Asian buttonbush, is a shrub-like herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory disorders, as well as to improve digestion and reduce inflammation. Leucas nutans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as extracted into essential oils for topical application or used in traditional remedies.
